---

## Describe the issue(s)
<!---

Please tell us:

- which CV(s) have issues
    - if you can, try and use precise identifiers like DRS names or IDs.
      If you don't know what these are, just describe as clearly as you can
- how you are looking at the CVs? The more detail you can give us here, the better
  (screenshots and links and when you looked at the CVs (including your timezone) are very helpful)
    - e.g. are you viewing them using esgvoc?
      If so, which esgvoc version and which CVs version?
      Are you looking at the CMOR tables?
      If so, which commit of the CMOR tables repository?

-->

## Potential solution(s)
<!---

If you have any suggestions, please tell us what you think the solution is to these issues.
E.g. modifying CVs values either in this repository or the universe, removing a duplicate CV entry.
-->

## Additional context
<!--- Add any other context you think might be relevant here. -->
